step.title: Generate infrastructure goals
step.rule: Steps 0-2 must have completed successfully (goal-001 and goal-002 created, plus domain and application goals for all BCs) before this step executes.
All inputs are read from docs/architecture/* files and templates on disk — never from conversation context (G-16).
One infrastructure goal per BC, phase=infrastructure. Each depends_on its own BC's application goal ID.

substep.title: Resolve BC list
substep.action: Reuse BC_LIST from Step 0 (the level-3 headings under "## Bounded Context Inventory" in docs/architecture/bounded-contexts.md). If unavailable, re-read it from disk (G-16). No template resolution or entity/VO/ACL extraction is needed at roadmap time — those fed concrete fields the elaborator now authors.

substep.title: Iterate BCs and emit infrastructure goal skeletons
substep.action: For each BC in BC_LIST (in dependency order from bounded-contexts.md):

per-bc.action: Look up this BC's application goal ID from previously generated goals (goals.yaml, phase=application, this BC). Store as APP_GOAL_ID. MUST be dynamically resolved — never hardcoded (G-03).

Set INFRA_AREA = contexts/{BC}/src/Bundle/ — the Bundle (infrastructure) layer directory for this BC in the resolved monorepo topology. COARSE deliverable path (depinfer seed + elaborator tree-read anchor), NOT a glob, NOT a per-file path.
Call goal-create MCP tool with a roadmap SKELETON:

params.param: Implement {BC} infrastructure: Doctrine XML mappings, repos, migration, integration tests
[APP_GOAL_ID] — each infrastructure goal depends on its own BC's application goal.

per-bc.rule: Description is parameterized with BC name — must stay under 120 chars (MaxGoalDescriptionLength).
max_retries=3 — infrastructure goals have focused scope per BC.

NO acceptance/validate/scope/context/investigation_config/not_in_scope params — roadmap skeleton; /tmux:elaborate authors every concrete field (including PI-08/PI-16/triad conditionals against the REAL tree) at dispatch (design §5/§6). NEVER run `tmux-cli rules match` here.

check.action: Print error with full context and ABORT.
Print: "{BC} infrastructure skeleton created: goal-{NNN} (phase=infrastructure, status=roadmap, depends_on=[{APP_GOAL_ID}], deliverable_area={INFRA_AREA})"

substep.title: Verify infrastructure goal count
substep.action: After all BC iterations complete, verify that exactly len(BC_LIST) infrastructure goals were created.

check.action: Print error: "Expected {bc_count} infrastructure goals, created {actual_count}. Missing BCs: {missing_list}"
Print: "Infrastructure generation complete: {bc_count} goals created (goal-{first_id}..goal-{last_id}), all phase=infrastructure, status=roadmap"
